settings.title: Settings
settings.nsfw.label: Adult Content (NSFW)
settings.nsfw.desc: When enabled, AI generates adult-oriented extended content (NPC intimate details, character bodies, etc.). When disabled, related prompt instructions are not sent to AI; existing data is preserved but no longer affects generation.
settings.nsfw.genderFilter.label: Gender Filter
settings.nsfw.genderFilter.desc: Only generate extended fields for NPCs matching the selected gender. The player avatar is not affected by this filter.
settings.audio.desc: Read the round narration aloud with CosyVoice. Add and assign the API endpoint under "API Config" as a TTS-category API.
settings.audio.enabled.label: Enable voice
settings.audio.enabled.desc: Master switch. When off, the round play button and auto-narration are hidden.
settings.audio.autoNarrate.label: Auto-narrate (read every round)
settings.audio.autoNarrate.desc: Automatically read the round narration after the AI responds. The first time you may need to click the page once to unlock browser autoplay.
settings.audio.mode.label: Transmission mode
settings.audio.mode.desc: Per-sentence stream: the text is split into sentences, each streamed as the server synthesizes it (streaming=1), the browser plays it progressively and prefetches the next for near-gapless playback — first sentence sounds fastest. Full: synthesize the whole text then play once, most robust.
settings.audio.rate.label: Speed
settings.audio.volume.label: Volume
settings.audio.speaker.label: Voice (speaker)
settings.audio.speaker.desc: Maps to CosyVoice's speaker param. Click "Fetch" to read available voices from the server.
settings.audio.speaker.fetchEmpty: Server returned no voices; you can enter one manually
settings.audio.speaker.fetchErr: Failed to fetch voices — check the TTS API config
settings.audio.instruct.label: Style / dialect (instruct)
settings.audio.instruct.desc: Natural language, maps to CosyVoice's instruct param. May be left blank.
settings.audio.favorites.label: Saved voices
settings.audio.favorites.desc: Save the current voice + style as a favorite; the main-panel quick switcher can apply it in one click.
settings.aiFeatures.desc: Control the toggle state of each optional AI feature. Disabled features do not consume API quota. You can assign different APIs to each feature in 'API Management > Feature Assignment'.
settings.aiFeatures.cot.label: Chain-of-Thought (CoT)
settings.aiFeatures.cot.desc: Execute an independent reasoning step before the main turn generation, letting the AI 'think it through' before writing the story. Improves plot logical consistency and skill check quality, but costs one extra API call.
settings.aiFeatures.cot.judge.label: Judge Reasoning
settings.aiFeatures.cot.judge.desc: Perform independent reasoning analysis during skill checks and contests
settings.aiFeatures.cot.injectStep2.desc: Inject Step 1 reasoning results into Step 2 instruction generation (in split mode)
settings.aiFeatures.cot.ringSize.label: Reasoning history rounds
settings.aiFeatures.cot.ringSize.desc: Keep the most recent N rounds of reasoning content for context injection (1-10)
settings.aiFeatures.bodyPolish.label: Body Polish
settings.aiFeatures.bodyPolish.desc: After the main turn narrative is generated, an independent AI polishes the text rhetorically. Improves writing quality but costs one extra API call per turn.
settings.aiFeatures.textOptimization.des: Post-process AI-generated text for grammar and style. Similar to Body Polish but lighter-weight, suitable for assigning to cheaper models to save costs.
settings.aiFeatures.lowLoad.label: Low Load Mode
settings.aiFeatures.lowLoad.desc: Limit the number of API requests per minute. When enabled, requests exceeding the quota are queued, preventing API provider rate limits from truncating responses.
Requests exceeding this number are queued (1-10)
settings.aiFeatures.worldHeartbeat.label: World Heartbeat
settings.aiFeatures.worldHeartbeat.desc: Periodically have the AI update world background state (weather changes, faction dynamics, price fluctuations, etc.), simulating a 'living world'. When disabled, world state remains fixed.
settings.aiFeatures.npcChat.label: NPC Private Chat
settings.aiFeatures.npcChat.desc: Initiate 1:1 conversations with NPCs in the relationship panel, independent of the main turn. When disabled, chat entries are hidden from the relationship panel.
settings.aiFeatures.locationNpcGen.label: Location NPC Generation
settings.aiFeatures.locationNpcGen.desc: Automatically generate local NPCs using AI when the player arrives at a new location. When disabled, only story-preset NPCs will appear.
settings.aiFeatures.presence.label: NPC Presence Zones
settings.aiFeatures.presence.desc: AI distinguishes between present and absent NPCs in the current scene, providing richer context descriptions and interactions for present characters.
settings.aiFeatures.plotDecompose.label: Plot Outline AI Decomposition
settings.aiFeatures.plotDecompose.desc: When creating a plot arc, have AI automatically decompose your outline into a trackable node chain. When disabled, you must create each node manually.
settings.aiFeatures.fieldRepair.label: Field Auto-completion
settings.aiFeatures.fieldRepair.desc: When AI responses are missing required fields (attributes, equipment, etc.), automatically initiate completion requests, reducing data gaps. Each completion costs one extra API call.
settings.aiFeatures.imageGen.label: Image Generation
settings.aiFeatures.imageGen.desc: When enabled, you can generate scene and character illustrations in the Image Workshop. Requires configuring an image generation API (DALL-E / ComfyUI / SD WebUI, etc.).
settings.aiFeatures.imageGen.migratedHin: Detailed image generation settings have been moved to
settings.aiFeatures.assistant.label: AI Assistant
settings.aiFeatures.assistant.desc: In-game AI chat assistant that can answer questions about the game world, characters, and rules. Uses independent API calls and does not affect main turn narrative.
settings.ui.fontSize.label: Font Size
settings.ui.themeAccent.label: Color Scheme
settings.ui.themeAccent.desc: Switch the interface accent color family
settings.ui.showActions.label: Show Action Options
settings.ui.showActions.desc: Display available actions after AI response
settings.ui.enableAnimations.label: Enable Animations
settings.game.autoSaveInterval.label: Auto-save Interval
settings.game.language.label: Language
settings.action.mode.label: Action Mode
settings.action.mode.desc: Control the style of AI-generated action options
settings.action.pace.label: Action Pace
settings.action.customPrompt.label: Custom Options Prompt
settings.action.customPrompt.desc: Guide AI to generate action options in a specific style (optional)
settings.action.customPrompt.placeholder: e.g.: Each option should include potential risk warnings...
settings.heartbeat.historyLimit.label: History Retention Count
settings.heartbeat.historyLimit.desc: Maximum heartbeat history entries to keep (5-100)
settings.heartbeat.forgetRounds.label: Forget After Rounds
settings.heartbeat.forgetRounds.desc: NPCs not updated for N rounds are excluded from heartbeat (0 = never forget)
settings.npc.demotionThreshold.label: NPC Demotion Threshold
settings.npc.demotionThreshold.desc: Important NPCs inactive for N rounds are demoted to regular NPCs
settings.npc.generationRange.label: Important NPC Generation Range
settings.npc.generationRange.desc: Number of important NPCs generated when arriving at a new location (min <= max, range 0-10)
settings.plot.enabled.label: Enable Plot Direction
settings.plot.enabled.desc: When enabled, active arc directives are injected into AI prompts
settings.plot.criticalConfirm.label: Critical Node Confirmation
settings.plot.criticalConfirm.desc: Critical nodes require player confirmation before advancing
settings.plot.confidenceThreshold.label: Confidence Threshold
settings.plot.confidenceThreshold.desc: AI evaluation confidence must reach this value to pass (0-1)
settings.plot.opportunityMaxTier.label: Max Guidance Tier
settings.plot.opportunityMaxTier.desc: Maximum tier that opportunity guidance can escalate to (1-3)
settings.plot.showGauges.label: Show Gauges in Main Panel
settings.plot.showGauges.desc: Display gauge progress bars at the top of the main game panel
settings.plot.showEvalLog.label: Evaluation Log
settings.plot.showEvalLog.desc: Show evaluation log at the bottom of the Plot Panel
settings.memory.sectionDesc: Adjust capacity and trigger points for short-term/mid-term/long-term memory. Default values are optimized for most games; only modify if you deeply understand the memory system.
settings.memory.shortTermLimit.label: Short-term Memory Capacity
settings.memory.shortTermLimit.desc: Number of recent turns to retain (oldest entry is promoted to mid-term when exceeded). Default: 5
settings.memory.midTermRefineThreshold.d: Triggers 'in-place refinement' (dedup and merge) when mid-term memory exceeds this count. Default: 25
settings.memory.longTermSummaryThreshold: Triggers 'worldview evolution' into long-term entries when mid-term memory exceeds this count. Default: 50
settings.memory.longTermSummarizeCount.d: Number of mid-term entries consumed per worldview evolution. Default: 50 (= threshold)
settings.memory.midTermKeep.label: Mid-term Retention After Evolution
settings.memory.midTermKeep.desc: How many latest mid-term entries to keep after worldview evolution (0 = clear all). Default: 0
settings.memory.longTermCap.label: Long-term Memory Capacity
settings.memory.longTermCap.desc: Triggers 'second-level refinement' (oldest entries compressed into topic archives) when exceeded. Default: 30
settings.memory.injectionStyle.label: Short-term Memory Injection Style
settings.memory.injectionStyle.desc: Determines how the main turn prompt includes recent history. Single block: merge short-term memory into one assistant message (fixed 3 API messages, most token-efficient). Few-shot turns: keep the most recent N user-assistant dialogue pairs (roughly 3+2N messages per turn, better for maintaining AI output format).
settings.memory.fewShotPairs.label: Few-shot Pairs
settings.memory.fewShotPairs.desc: Keep the most recent N (user, assistant) real dialogue pairs as format examples. Default: 3; more than 5 can significantly increase token costs.
settings.memory.resetDefaults.label: Restore Defaults
settings.memory.resetDefaults.desc: Restore all thresholds above to engine defaults
settings.advanced.debugMode.label: Debug Mode
settings.advanced.debugMode.desc: Show Prompt Assembly panel entry, enable verbose logging
settings.advanced.consoleDebug.label: Console Verbose Logging
settings.advanced.aiLogging.label: AI API Full Logging (incl. prompt/response)
settings.advanced.textReplace.label: Text Replacement Rules
settings.advanced.textReplace.desc: {count} rules, applied before narrative text rendering
settings.advanced.importExport.label: Import / Export Settings
settings.advanced.importExport.desc: Save all current settings to a JSON file
settings.advanced.clearCache.label: Clear Cache
settings.advanced.clearCache.desc: Clear aga_* temporary data (excluding API configuration)
settings.advanced.clearCache.confirmText: This will clear all temporary cache data with the aga_* prefix (excluding API configuration and backup data).
settings.textReplace.empty: No rules yet. Click 'New Rule' to add one.
settings.textReplace.replacementPlacehol: Replace with (leave empty to delete matches)
settings.scale.uiScale.label: UI Scale ({value}%)
settings.scale.textSpeed.label: Text Speed
settings.data.exportAllSaves.label: Export All Saves
settings.data.exportAllSaves.desc: Download all character profiles and save slots as a JSON file
settings.data.importSaves.label: Import Saves
settings.data.importSaves.desc: Restore previously exported save data from a JSON file
settings.data.importProfilesFound: Found {count} profiles — full import awaiting backend implementation
settings.data.clearAll.label: Clear All Data
settings.data.clearAll.desc: Irreversible, will delete all saves and configuration
settings.data.clearAll.step1Confirm: This action is irreversible. Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.data.clearAll.step2Hint: Please click 'Confirm Clear All Data' again to proceed.
settings.engram.enabled.label: Enable Engram
settings.engram.enabled.desc: When enabled, extracts semantic memory nodes each turn to build a knowledge graph
settings.engram.retrieval.title: Retrieval Mode
settings.engram.retrieval.strategy.label: Retrieval Strategy
settings.engram.retrieval.strategy.desc: Legacy: keyword + time decay; Hybrid: vector + BM25 + RRF + BFS triple-path retrieval
settings.engram.embedding.title: Vector Embedding
settings.engram.embedding.enabled.label: Enable Vector Retrieval
settings.engram.embedding.enabled.desc: Requires assigning an Embedding API in API Management
settings.engram.embedding.assignedApi.de: Set in API Management panel > RAG Feature Assignment
settings.engram.embedding.topK.label: Retrieval Count topK
settings.engram.embedding.topK.desc: Maximum candidates returned by vector nearest-neighbor retrieval (1-200)
settings.engram.embedding.minScore.label: Similarity Threshold minScore
settings.engram.embedding.minScore.desc: Results below this score are discarded (0.0-1.0)
settings.engram.rerank.title: Reranking
settings.engram.rerank.enabled.label: Enable Reranking
settings.engram.rerank.enabled.desc: Re-rank recalled results for precision (requires Rerank API)
settings.engram.rerank.assignedApi.label: Assigned API
settings.engram.rerank.assignedApi.desc: Set in API Management panel > RAG Feature Assignment
settings.engram.rerank.topN.label: Retention Count topN
settings.engram.budget.title: Retrieval Budget
settings.engram.budget.maxCandidates.des: Maximum total candidates per retrieval, allocated 50/25/25 to facts/entities/events (5-100)
settings.engram.budget.shortTermWindow.d: Exclude events from the most recent N rounds (overlapping with short-term memory) to avoid duplicate injection (0-20)
settings.engram.trim.title: Event Trimming
settings.engram.trim.trigger.label: Trim Trigger
settings.engram.trim.trigger.desc: Automatically trim old events when limits are exceeded
settings.engram.trim.countLimit.label: Max Event Count
settings.engram.trim.countLimit.desc: Triggers trimming when total events exceed this limit (10-500)
settings.engram.trim.tokenLimit.label: Token Budget
settings.engram.trim.tokenLimit.desc: Triggers trimming when estimated event text tokens exceed this limit (500-50000)
settings.engram.trim.keepRecent.label: Always Keep Recent
settings.engram.trim.keepRecent.desc: Regardless of trimming aggressiveness, always keep the newest N events (1-100)
settings.engram.advanced.title: Advanced
settings.engram.advanced.pruneToImportan: Filter out events and entities associated with non-important NPCs, reducing noise
settings.engram.advanced.debug.label: Debug Mode
settings.engram.advanced.debug.desc: When enabled, shows Engram debug panel in the sidebar
settings.engram.advanced.knowledgeEdge.d: When enabled, AI extracts inter-entity facts each turn to build searchable knowledge graph edges
